arts.ttl: How to watch Tottenham vs Liverpool: TV and streaming info for Carabao Cup semi-final
arts.sum: Spurs and Liverpool meet in the first leg of their Carabao Cup semi-final this evening, as Ange Postecoglou and Arne Slot dream of a place in March's final at Wembley

arts.ttl: Liverpool 'eye' move for Borussia Dortmund star as forward reveals 'dream' Arne Slot transfer reunion
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund sensation Jamie Bynoe-Gittens has been linked with a return to the Premier League

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Real Madrid speak out on Virgil van Dijk amid Elon Musk interest
arts.sum: Liverpool continue negotiations to keep Mo Salah, Trent Alexander-Arnold and Virgil van Dijk, while the world's richest man, Elon Musk, is interested in buying the club

arts.ttl: Tottenham could be without 11 players for Liverpool as selection crisis gets worse
arts.sum: The Tottenham Hotspur news gets no better for Ange Postecoglou ahead of their Carabao Cup semi-final first-leg tie at home to Liverpool

arts.ttl: Why Tottenham and trophies have never gone together - and why Ange Postecoglou must snap that streak
arts.sum: MATT BARLOW: More than 6,000 days have passed since Jonathan Woodgate's header beat Chelsea at Wembley in the days when people still thought Carabao was a kind of reindeer.

arts.ttl: Elon Musk buying Liverpool would be like seeing your dream home bulldozed - he is everything this city cannot stand and even if he made every ticket free I would never sit on the Kop again, writes DOMINIC KING
arts.sum: COMMENT BY DOMINIC KING: It felt a bit early for April Fool's Day but, lo and behold, Musk's father, Errol, went on Times Radio on Tuesday afternoon to set out his son's wish.

arts.ttl: I hate Trent Alexander-Arnold talk - his head's not in Madrid, it's at Liverpool
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold has been defended by Tim Sherwood after the Liverpool right-back was criticised for his performance against Manchester United

arts.ttl: Ange: Even Salah would struggle at Tottenham
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has said that even Liverpool forward Mohamed Salah would struggle in his Tottenham side.

arts.ttl: Ange: Even Salah would struggle at Tottenham at the moment
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has claimed even Mohamed Salah would struggle in his Tottenham side despite the Liverpool forward's red-hot form in front of goal.

arts.ttl: Tottenham get fresh Newcastle handball verdict as controversial VAR decision takes another twist
arts.sum: Despite the ball hitting Joelinton's hand in the build-up, match official Andy Madley let it slide and wasn't referred to a pitch-side check. Head of Premier League refereeing body PGMOL, Howard Webb, has explained the process in which Anthony Gordon's goal for Newcastle United was allowed to stance against Tottenham.
